policy: Structure density should feel full and civilized without recreating crashy village-pool conflicts. Standalone Ascendant Guild structures are live; deeper third-party village injection remains gated.

groups.density_policy: common enough for multiplayer travel; avoid multiple bounty centers in tiny villages
live standalone structures with widened spacing after duplicate-board feedback
visible during exploration but not every chunk
groups.runtime_owner: installed structure mods and config spacing

groups.density_policy: common exploration rewards; loot should not jump past rare/epic early
groups.runtime_owner: Loot Integrations and future Open Loader loot overrides

groups.density_policy: memorable targets with strong rewards and contracts
groups.runtime_owner: structure mods, Bountiful major board, future loot tables

groups.density_policy: rare, telegraphed, and dangerous; never used as village filler
groups.runtime_owner: mod configs first; Ascendant Settlement/Atlas helper if distance-aware gating is needed

pool_injection_gate.current: standalone only for Ascendant Guild structures
pool_injection_gate.custom_mod_threshold: If datapack injection cannot prevent duplicates, bad orientation, or third-party processor conflicts, build Ascendant Settlement Engine instead of forcing more JSON hacks.
